creator: gerald@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->closed

Thanks for this report.  Ever since receiving it I tried to reproduce 
it in many different settings, yet failed.  Also FreeBSD portsmon and 
the FreeBSD build cluster have not been reporting this, nor any other 
users, so it must have been something special (broken) in your setup 
I am afraid.  If you are still seeing this, with a regularily installed 
ports tree and Perl port, please let us know.
